title: Credit Analyst
description:
FedEx operates the world's largest express delivery network, shipping to 220+ countries with cutting-edge logistics technology.

We're seeking a Credit Analyst to join our Logistics team in Des Moines. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Evaluate creditworthiness of corporate and commercial borrowers
Analyze financial statements and assess credit risk
Prepare credit reports and recommendations for loan decisions
Monitor existing credit relationships and flag early warning indicators
Support loan portfolio management and risk mitigation
Maintain accurate credit documentation and compliance files

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or Business
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in credit analysis, commercial lending, or financial analysis
